name: Freq Shifter
explanation: A Bode-style single-sideband frequency shifter. It splits the input into a 90-degree quadrature pair with a Hilbert-transform allpass network, modulates by a quadrature carrier, and keeps only one sideband — shifting every frequency by a fixed number of Hertz rather than by a ratio. A harmonic input becomes inharmonic and metallic. Controls: Shift (-500..500 Hz), Sideband (down/up), Feedback for shimmering inharmonic cascades, and dry/wet Mix.
